creator: sarumaru@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Approve.
But take maintainership or leave maintainer as ports@,
because I will not use astah-community.
Thanks,


(2011/05/01 2:30), Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/jude-community,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/156740 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/156740
>
